# GitHub logins blocked from earning any score on this repo -- one per line,
# `#` starts a comment. Read by eval.pr_bot.load_blocked_contributors() on
# every gate-chain run. Additions are logged with a reason in FLAGGED.md;
# see COPYCATS.md for how an account lands here via copycat enforcement.
#
# Empty by design until the first real strike -- do not seed this
# speculatively.
